repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: Support Proposition 1 null-annihilator criterion for proximal ATE point identification

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023: proximal ATE/ATT can be uniquely identified as a linear functional of a nonunique bridge solution

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: null-annihilator support criterion; no two-sample long-term latent-realization frontier

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 plus GhassamiEtAl2022/HungChen2026: bridge-based long-term/data-fusion ID exists, but not this exact Delta_CK frontier
GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023: proxy partial-ID bounds when completeness fails; no named Delta_CK width modulus

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The null-annihilator/constant-linear-functional criterion duplicates eid_proximal_phase_v1 Support Proposition 1, apart from replacing the single-sample proximal loading by lambda_E.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses closer long-term proximal/data-fusion comparators: GhassamiEtAl2022, arXiv:2201.10743, and HungChen2026, arXiv:2601.17712.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparator citations to MiaoGengTchetgen2018, ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023, and ImbensKallusMaoWang2025 have no section, equation, page, or quoted gap anchor.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 and AtheyChettyImbensKang2019 comparisons are bibkey-level only, with no location-level anchor to the claimed partial-ID or surrogate-index gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The generic open finite-support class cites a two-wave noisy-panel witness, but the witness lacks a fully specified non-corner observable law or parametric family with cell probabilities.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The singleton iff row(T_B) claim is false for the stated bounded fiber H_B=[0,1]^d cap T_B h=m_B: box constraints can make the feasible fiber singleton even when lambda_E has nonzero projection onto ker T_B.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The positive Delta_CK nonidentification direction inherits the same boundary failure: Delta_CK>0 need not yield two feasible bridge values, let alone two realized latent laws, without an interior/full-feasible-null assumption.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary surrogacy
soundness_flags.one_line: Orthogonality to differences among feasible bridges does not imply Delta_CK=0 unless feasible differences span the full kernel of T_B.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Delta_CK by a feasible-difference-span or polyhedral gauge index, or add an interior/full-null-realization assumption to every result using the full ker T_B projection.
Add GhassamiEtAl2022 and HungChen2026 to the comparator chain and state the exact strict extension over their bridge/data-fusion identification results.
Give a fully specified two-wave binary noisy-panel witness with cell probabilities, T_B, m_B, lambda_E, and computed positive width.
Add section/equation/page anchors for each flagship comparator and phrase Conjecture 1 as a strict tightening of the closest anchored theorem.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version and redraft the kernel around a feasible-null/gauge frontier before rerunning novelty review.
